0.text: Diffuse ground glass opacities throughout both lungs

1.text: Pulmonary nodules in the right middle lobe, largest measuring 4 mm

2.text: Subpleural nodules in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe, measuring 3 mm and 4 mm

3.text: Nodules in the right lower lobe laterobasal and mediobasal subpleural segments, each measuring 3 mm

4.text: Nodule in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe, measuring 4 mm

5.text: Nodule in the lingular segment of the left lung, measuring 8x5 mm

6.text: Adjacent nodules in the left lower lobe laterobasal segment, measuring 5 mm and 2 mm

7.text: Additional subpleural nodules in the left lower lobe laterobasal and posterobasal segments, largest measuring 4 mm
